front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body. The character is an Ether Knight — a heavy plate armor warrior in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. He wears steel blue and silver plate armor with wide shoulder pauldrons engraved with glowing cyan ether runes. A memory crest adorns the center chestplate. His open-face visor helmet has a glowing rune on the forehead emitting soft cyan light. He wields a one-handed sword with ethereal blue energy in his right hand and a kite shield with an ether crystal emblem in his left. A short half-cape with blue lining flows behind him. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.

side.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character, left-facing side view, full body. The character is an Ether Knight in heavy steel blue and silver plate armor, shown from the side profile. The shield is held at his left side, sword sheathed at the hip. Shoulder pauldron runes glow with cyan light from the side angle. A short cape flows behind. Same dark fantasy Korean MMORPG pixel art style, 2.5 head ratio chibi proportions, 512x512 with 2px black outline, clean pixel edges, transparent background. Top-left lighting, 3-step shading. NO text, NO watermarks, NO 3D effects.

back.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character, back view, full body. The character is an Ether Knight shown from behind. The cape is fully visible flowing down, shield strapped to his back, sword sheath at waist. Heavy steel blue and silver plate armor with glowing cyan rune engravings visible on the pauldrons from behind. The midnight blue cape exterior with blue inner lining shows at the edges. Dark fantasy Korean MMORPG pixel art, 2.5 head ratio, 512x512, 2px black outline, transparent background. NO text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
